← All NHC examples

NHC1 — competitor without starting TCF is rejected, not scored

Scoring system: NHC1    α (blend factor): 0.15 
3 boats; one (Gamma) has no nhcStartingTcf at all.
Gamma must be rejected with reason 'no_starting_tcf' and absent from scores.
Aggregates and other boats reflect the 2-boat fleet.

Computation for the 2 rated boats:
  Alpha: TCF 1.0, ET 3000, CT 3000.0
  Beta:  TCF 1.0, ET 3600, CT 3600.0
  CT_avg = 3300.0,  mean(TCF) = 1.0

  Alpha: ratio = 3300/3000 = 1.10,  fair = 1.10,
         adj = 0.15 × 0.10 = 0.015,  new = 1.015
  Beta:  ratio = 3300/3600 = 0.916666...,  fair = 0.916666...,
         adj = 0.15 × −0.083333... = −0.0125, new = 0.9875
no nhcStartingTcf — must be rejected

Race 1

Gun time: 14:00:00   α: 0.15   Finishers: 2   CTavg: 55m 00s   mean(TCF): 1.0000
RankNameSail # Finish timeETTCFappliedCT CTavg/CTfair TCFadjnew TCF Points
1 Alpha 1 14:50:00 50m 00s 1.0000 50m 00s 1.1000 1.1000 +0.0150 1.0150 1
2 Beta 2 15:00:00 60m 00s 1.0000 60m 00s 0.9167 0.9167 -0.0125 0.9875 2

RankNameSail #R1TotalNet
1 Alpha 1 1 1 1
